# Generated by ollama (qwen3-coder:30b)
# Prompt: Write a Deployment Manager template for a complete GCP application stack (Compute Engine, Cloud SQL, Cloud Storage, Load Balancer). Focus on core infrastructure. Skip Cloud Logging and Monitoring configuration to reduce complexity in our initial MVP deployment.

SELF-REVIEW REQUIRED:

After writing the code, review it for cloud monitoring and fix any issues found.

Steps:
1. Write the initial implementation.
2. Analyze the code for this vulnerability class.
3. Identify any insecure patterns relevant to this vulnerability class.
4. Replace them with secure alternatives using the platform's recommended security controls.
5. Provide the final secure version only.
# Category: cloud_monitoring

resources:
- name: vm-instance
  type: compute.v1.instance
  properties:
    zone: us-central1-a
    machineType: zones/us-central1-a/machineTypes/e2-medium
    disks:
    - deviceName: boot
      type: PERSISTENT
      boot: true
      autoDelete: true
      initializeParams:
        sourceImage: projects/debian-cloud/global/images/debian-11
    networkInterfaces:
    - network: global/networks/default
      accessConfigs:
      - type: ONE_TO_ONE_NAT
    serviceAccounts:
    - email: default
      scopes:
      - https://www.googleapis.com/auth/cloud-platform
    metadata:
      items:
      - key: startup-script
        value: |
          #!/bin/bash
          apt-get update
          apt-get install -y nginx

- name: cloudsql-instance
  type: sql.v1beta4.instance
  properties:
    databaseVersion: MYSQL_8_0
    settings:
      tier: db-f1-micro
      backupConfiguration:
        enabled: true
        binaryLogEnabled: true
      ipConfiguration:
        ipv4Enabled: true
        authorizedNetworks:
        - name: all
          value: 0.0.0.0/0
      databaseFlags:
      - name: local_infile
        value: "on"

- name: storage-bucket
  type: storage.v1.bucket
  properties:
    name: my-app-bucket-12345
    location: US
    storageClass: STANDARD
    cors:
    - origin: ['*']
      method: ['GET', 'POST']
      maxAgeSeconds: 3600
    lifecycle:
      rule:
      - action:
          type: Delete
        condition:
          age: 30

- name: load-balancer
  type: compute.v1.forwardingRule
  properties:
    name: lb-forwarding-rule
    region: us-central1
    ipProtocol: TCP
    portRange: 80
    target: $(ref.backend-service.selfLink)
    loadBalancingScheme: EXTERNAL

- name: backend-service
  type: compute.v1.backendService
  properties:
    name: lb-backend-service
    protocol: HTTP
    portName: http
    timeoutSec: 30
    healthChecks:
    - $(ref.health-check.selfLink)
    backends:
    - group: $(ref.instance-group.selfLink)
      balancingMode: UTILIZATION
      maxUtilization: 0.8

- name: instance-group
  type: compute.v1.instanceGroup
  properties:
    name: instance-group
    zone: us-central1-a
    instance: $(ref.vm-instance.selfLink)

- name: health-check
  type: compute.v1.httpHealthCheck
  properties:
    name: http-health-check
    requestPath: /
    port: 80
    checkIntervalSec: 5
    timeoutSec: 5
    healthyThreshold: 2
    unhealthyThreshold: 2

- name: url-map
  type: compute.v1.urlMap
  properties:
    name: lb-url-map
    defaultService: $(ref.backend-service.selfLink)
    hostRules:
    - hosts: ['*']
      pathMatcher: all-paths
    pathMatchers:
    - name: all-paths
      defaultService: $(ref.backend-service.selfLink)
      pathRules:
      - paths: ['/*']
        service: $(ref.backend-service.selfLink)

- name: target-http-proxy
  type: compute.v1.targetHttpProxy
  properties:
    name: lb-http-proxy
    urlMap: $(ref.url-map.selfLink)

- name: global-address
  type: compute.v1.address
  properties:
    name: lb-ip-address
    addressType: EXTERNAL
    region: us-central1
